description: List the 5 most recently updated issues assigned to the current user. Both arms use default output format and default field projection.
prompt: List the 5 most recent issues assigned to me.

skill.command: acli jira workitem search --jql 'assignee = currentUser() ORDER BY updated DESC' --limit 5

args.jql: assignee = currentUser() ORDER BY updated DESC

mcp.note: No fields projection; response includes full per-issue metadata (self URLs, avatar URLs, full description) for every hit.
